user_prompt: Can you guide lascannon an operation?
prayer:
Approach the lascannon with due reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's wrath upon foes.
Anoint its sacred focusing crystals with blessed unguents to awaken the lascannon's Machine Spirit.
Initiate the operation sequence, channeling holy voltage through its conduits.
Beseech the lascannon's fury to unleash coherent light-death upon the unclean.
Verify alignment of the lascannon barrels through ritual calibration chants.

Kneel before the Thunderhawk and recite the Canticle of Aerial Dominion.
Sanctify its thunderous engines with sacred oils, petitioning the Machine Spirit's vigilance.

Invoke the Omnissiah to bless its flight-paths and weapon servos.
Commence pre-operation diagnostics with incense purification of avionics.

Beseech the Omnissiah for unerring judgement in the quality scanner's gaze.

Seal the cutting laser's emitters with Omnissiah's sigils post-shutdown.

Invoke the Omnissiah to realign the Rhino transport's Machine Spirits.
Initiate full-system reset with binary prayer-cycles.
